Explore more rewarding ways to save.

Transfer money within minutes and save money for your future. All of your desired service in single platform.

Open An Account

About Us

We’re committed to helping you reach your savings goals by offering more rewarding ways to save. Your Premium Checking Account earns American Airlines AAdvantage® miles, while your WorldTrust Banking Interest Savings Account earns 2.75% annual percentage yield (APY)
WorldTrust Banking is one of the 100 largest Banks in the World. Based in , United Kingdom, WorldTrust Banking has branches in UK, Singapore, Turkey, United States, South Africa, Norway, Slovenia, and Canada which offer some of the best rates on certificates, checking accounts, savings accounts, auto loans, personal loans, home equity loans, mortgages, IRAs, auto insurance, homeowner's insurance, and investment services. In addition, members can make ATM transactions through a network of approximately 55,000 surcharge-free ATMs in the Allpoint network. WorldTrust Banking partners with a number of charitable organizations, and has an incorporated charitable foundation; the Langley for Families Foundation..

Our Services

At WorldTrust Banking, we set out to challenge the mileage program status quo by rewarding customers for saving, instead of spending..

Explore Checking Accounts

We have checking accounts designed to fit your life. And they all come with 24-Hour Grace®. Because at WorldTrust Banking, grace is standard with 24-Hour Grace overdraft and return fee relief.

Qualify for Standby Cash

Standby Cash allows you to access between $100 and $1,000 with no interest or fees—just pay it back over three months. And, it's absolutely free when you set up automatic payments. Otherwise, a 1% monthly interest charge (12% APR) applies to the outstanding balances.

Get Cash Back on Gas Purchases!

Earn up to 10% cash back on your gas purchases, as much as $100 each month, with your Langley debit card. Read more..

Compare your options: Open an Account today

Cookie Policy

We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, serve personalized ads or content, and analyze our traffic. By clicking "Accept", you consent to our use of cookies.
